1.title: Config - Status
1.query:
timeseries status = avg(dt.sfm.extension.config.status)
| sort arrayAvg(status) desc
| limit 20

2.title: Endpoint - Statuses
2.query:
timeseries statuses = avg(dt.sfm.extension.endpoint.statuses)
| sort arrayAvg(statuses) desc
| limit 20

3.title: Engine - Communication Buffer - Size
3.query:
timeseries size = avg(dt.sfm.extension.engine.communication_buffer.size)
| sort arrayAvg(size) desc
| limit 20

4.title: Engine - Communication Buffer - Used
4.query:
timeseries used = avg(dt.sfm.extension.engine.communication_buffer.used)
| sort arrayAvg(used) desc
| limit 20

5.title: Engine - Config - Status
5.query:
timeseries status = avg(dt.sfm.extension.engine.config.status)
| sort arrayAvg(status) desc
| limit 20

6.title: Engine - Event Ingest - Data Sent
6.query:
timeseries data_sent = avg(dt.sfm.extension.engine.event_ingest.data_sent),
  by: { dt.entity.host }
| fieldsAdd host_name = entityName(dt.entity.host)
| sort arrayAvg(data_sent) desc
| limit 20

7.title: Engine - Event Ingest - Events Rejected
7.query:
